programme.title: Cold Blood

programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Are You Here

programme.title: The Crow: Salvation
programme.desc: A resurrected man seeks revenge.

programme.title: Pacific Heights

programme.title: Roxanne

programme.title: The Master Of Disguise

programme.title: Dragon Wars
programme.desc: Dragon-like creatures from an ancient legend appear in Los Angeles, scale buildings, flip cars and terrorize the city in search for a girl named Sarah. While investigating one of the disaster sites, a TV reporter Ethan, uncovers a piece of debris which directly links him to this legend. Ethan must realize his destiny as an ancient warrior who was re-born to protect Sarah from the evil dragons and save the city from total destruction.

programme.title: Funny Girl
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand s debut film won her the Academy Award for her performance as singer-comediene, Fanny Brice. Nominated for seven other awards, this classic musical film contrasts Fanny s onstage antics with her offstage romance with dashing gambler, Nicky Arnstein (Omar Shariff).

programme.title: Queen Bee
programme.desc: A seemingly-gracious Southern socialite rules her circle of family and friends with an iron fist.

programme.title: The Taming Of The Shrew
programme.desc: A rambunctious version of Shakespeare's comedy about a rich merchant who has two daughters, one sweet, comely and shy and the other gorgeous but mean-tempered. The sweet-tempered daughter is being courted by several young men who are stunned when her father announces that she cannot marry until her sister does.

programme.title: The Solid Gold Cadillac
programme.desc: A lowly stockholder exposes a big company's corrupt Board of Directors.

programme.title: A Midnight Clear
programme.desc: As the end of World War II approaches, a group of American soldiers are assigned to watch activity amidst the stark snow-covered landscape of the French-German border and soon discover a battle-weary enemy as reluctant to fight as they are. With common ground established, the German platoon offer to be "captured" and a phony battle is staged to save honor. However, a tragic misunderstanding has devastating consequences in this powerful depiction of war's insanity.

programme.title: Aguirre, The Wrath Of God
programme.desc: A few decades after the destruction of the Inca empire, a Spanish expedition leaves the mountains of Peru and goes down the Amazon river in search of gold and wealth. Soon, they come across great difficulties and Don Aguirres, a ruthless man who cares only about riches, becomes their leader. But will his quest lead them to "the golden city", or to certain destruction?

programme.title: Nosferatu The Vampyre [Subbed]

programme.title: Take Back

The stakes are higher than ever imagined.

But Ze's plans are bigger than just revenge: he aims to rally and recruit every woman working the highway.

programme.title: Superdeep
programme.desc: Inspired by true events. The Russian Kola Superdeep Borehole is the largest drilling project in the world, attempting to drill as far as possible into the Earth's crust. But when a small team of scientists and military personnel set out to unearth the source of the strange sounds, they end up discovering the greatest threat that humanity has ever faced.

programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Meet Mrs Drysdale" - Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early, because she'll meet the Clampetts. programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Billy the Kid, Pat Garrett, and Doc Holliday ride again in Howard Hughes' epic 1943 western, but the character you'll remember most is sultry country vixen Rio McDonald. Hughes' nationwide search for an actress to play Rio resulted in the film debut of Jane Russell, whose natural assets were allegedly helped by a special bra designed by Hughes. When The Outlaw finally received a nationwide release in 1946, its success vindicated Hughes and made Russell a star. As for Hughes' infamous bra, Russell said in her 1988 memoir, I never wore it, and he never knew.

programme.title: Mason of the Mounted

programme.title: Fighting Fury
programme.desc: A THRILLING TALE OF REVENGE AND REDEMPTION! Based on the story Triple Cross for Danger by the widely lauded Western author Walter J. Coburn, Fighting Fury is a thrilling take on the Western revenge drama. Portraying both a father and his son, star of silent and sound cowboy adventure films, Jack Hoxie (Trouble Busters, Law and Lawless) exudes the classic American rustic charm that still defines the genre. The film spins the yarn of Clay Hill Jr. (Hoxie), a Spanish-American boy raised by a Mexican servant who vows bloody vengeance on three malicious ranchers after they murder his parents and turn his life upside down. Featuring fine supporting performances from genre heavies Helen Holmes, Buck Conners and Western mainstay Fred Kohler.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Ablaze with guns and guts and glory! Randolph Scott headlines as a star studded cast in this yarn about battling homesteaders. Director Edwin L. Marin (Tall in the Saddle) spins this dramatic post-Civil War tale that takes place in the legendary cow town of Abilene, Kansas, coaxing fine performances from the likes of Ann Dvorak, Edgar Buchanan, Thonda Fleming, and Lloyd Bridges. Saddle up and hang on!

programme.desc: The Hammond's love the Lake District, but there has been an entire petrolhead paradise hiding in plain sight for years, just over the valley from their house in Buttermere. programme.title: We Drove the £3 Public Rally Stage (that anyone can go to)
programme.desc: Ben & Mike take two legendary road rally cars on a short road trip from Collins’ Farm to Porlock Hill, a public toll road that doubles as a Tarmac rally stage at certain times of the year. Paying £3 per drive, Ben and Mike thrash their cars up and down the hill to test their cars rally credentials, the road and their own driving skills.

programme.title: Ex-Stig THRASHES The New 911 GT3 RS Around The Top Gear Track!
programme.desc: The 992 911 GT3 RS is arguably Porsche's greatest performance car ever, but what does Ben Collins make of it? We hired Dunsfold Aerodrome (the Top Gear test track), threw Ben the keys to the RS and let him loose to explore the limits of this racecar in roadcar clothing.

programme.desc: Richard owns a Land Rover Defender, and he thought his was cool with its Bowler bits and ORE 4x4 mods. programme.title: Soap

programme.title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula

programme.title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula

programme.title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula

programme.title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula

programme.title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula

Special guest judges, Bob The Drag Queen and "What We Do in the Shadows" star, Harvey Guillen join the Boulet Brothers to determine who will make it to the finish line and who will be left in a pile of dust.

programme.title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula

programme.title: The Boulet Brothers' Dragula

programme.desc: "Jay Gordon" - Dave cooks a meal for Jay Gordon, founder of the legendary streetwear and fashion destination Bodega, which might just have a location in the Row DTLA, if you know where to look.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes a boiled chicken, one of his favorite ways to prepare a delicious meal (2:37). While it boils, he recaps episode 1 of the new season of Netflix's Dinner Time Live with David Chang, the sandwich episode with Joe Manganiello and Joel Kim Booster (7:01). Dave answers an Ask Dave about pop-up restaurants (43:33), and finishes it off by taking his versatile boiled chicken international (48:44).

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes a quick snack that you might see more and more often in the coming years: dried squid. He talks about the rising amount of cephalopods in the ocean, the specific umami and texture of squid, and ponders if it might be coming to more and more grocery store shelves near you. He also answers an Ask Dave about London eating, and general dining strategy when on a short trip in a new place.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave sits down with Eric Wareheim and Gabe Ulla, authors of the new book 'Steak House: The People, the Places, the Recipes'. Amongst friends, the discussion ranges from the magic of steakhouses to the ideal steakhouse order. The myriad types of potato sides are listed, the right way to order a martini is declared, and the idea of the steak dinner celebration as a descendant of the old-school hunt and sacrifice is posed. Dave also cooks a wet-aged and a dry-aged (or, at least, a little less wet-aged) steak for the co-writing duo.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave interviews someone as pessimistically optimistic as him today: Alex Stupak, Chef and Founder of Empellón. Dave and Alex talk about the Dark Arts of sandbagging, the end of 'High/Low' dining, and the history of food leading to today. They also discuss selling out, Alex's new social media presence, and the origin of ideas. Somehow, by the end of the podcast, these two "pessimists" end up hopeful for the future of the cooking world, even with AI imminent .

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: On today's episode, Dave talks about the rise of an icon in America: the burger! In the first part of an overarching 25-for-25 series on the rise of fast casual dining, Dave discusses the most influential burger moments in recent history, the celebrity butcher, and how we got to this point—the point in which burger spots rule. He then answers an Ask Dave and cooks up some homemade burgers.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: In this episode that left the kitchen smelling like fryer oil, Dave makes chicken wings 3 ways (11:26), in search of the best version to make at home...and the winner is a big surprise. programme.title: The Irish Pub
programme.desc: The Irish Pub is a eulogy to the greatest institution in Irish society, the pub or more specifically the traditional Irish publicans who run them. The characters in this exceptionally endearing film all run and own pubs that have been in their families for generations and it is through their warmth, wit and wisdom that we gain an insight into the heart and soul of The Irish Pub.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: Athens is an exceptional country to experience history. First, visit Syntagma Square and Greece's famous landmark- The Acropolis. An excursion to Greece is nothing without a trip to the Agora, as we finish off by enjoying Athens' most abundant resource- water.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: Have a blast with Laura on this Hawaiian voyage as you explore sensational surf and beaches, unique Hawaiian culture and food, and climb volcanic mountains. Join Laura as she visits historic landmarks, such as the Iolani Palace and the Bishop Museum.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: Board a private mega-yacht with seafarer Laura McKenzie, and cruise the deep blue waters of the Mediterranean Sea in style. You will visit Greece, the land of the sun and the gods, and the islands of Hydra, Malta, and Sicily.

programme.title: Culinary Travels With Dave Eckert
programme.desc: Culinary Travels is braving the cold to discover the freshest, most distinct flavors of Canada. From local coffee and ice cream to cuisine that travels directly from the farm to the table, here we will taste the very best of Ontario.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: The stunning restaurants we experienced, and the exceptional culinary masters we learned valuable insights from, have more to share as we join host Phil Davenport for a final hurrah to what was a truly memorable visit to Malaysia.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: Chefs Tetsuya Wakuda, Justin Quek, and David Myers wine and dine us at their upper echelon restaurants, share their love of food, introduce us to a few special dishes, and even let us eves drop on one of their master class sessions.

programme.title: The Toque 12

programme.title: The New Environmentalists
programme.desc: Fresh water is one of Earth's sacred resources. Lake Turkana's freshwater resources are vital to countless people who rely on it for sustenance. When a dam threatened to disturb the Lake's ecosystem, some took action to protect their home.

programme.title: Cuba, Embracing its Future
programme.desc: What other country has eaten organic food for the past 20 years, has derived 30% of its energy from renewable sources, is a pioneer in ecotourism, and has a Ministry for Climate Change? The answer is, Cuba, with 263 protected areas, including six UNESCO World Biosphere Reserves.

programme.title: The Silk Road
programme.desc: Marvel at the pleasure gardens of Fin in the oasis of Kashan. In the nearby mountains, visit the temple of Chak Chak and become introduced to the ancestral religion of Zoroastrianism. In the sacred city of Yazd, visit a zurkhaneh, or a "house of strength," where athletes engage in training sessions.

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Rock Scissors Paper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Ice Cream? Helicopter? What is it? Get your hands and fingers ready for this Super Simple Song for kids.

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Nadya and her Super Wings friends are able to dance ballet, but Nadya's father needs help getting back home. Can Nadya and her Super Wings friends save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Iulia's grandfather makes the mechanical robot dinosaurs come to live, but all except Rex go hay-wired, because of the rain. How will Jett, Noah, and Iulia save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Nita and her father and Jett have to get all the waterproof toys outta the river, but there are too many of them, What will Jett, Nita, and her father do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maryam and her camel Ziz are getting ready for the camel fashion show, but Ziz trips into a wheelbarrow, and runs off. How will Jett and Maryam save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yi enters the race called the great wall of go, but the battery goes dead. What will Yi and his pit crew do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a young foal goes missing from a herd of wild horses in Patagonia, Jett and Team Dizzy help a girl named Nayla go on a search and rescue mission in the mountains to find it. A young boy named Daniel in B.C. Canada asks Jett to bring him a tool kit to help him build a treehouse for his dad. The treehouse is a success but a melting glacier causes a flood of the nearby river.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Maxim in Kazakhstan gets Jett to bring him a package of Kazahk doughnuts so he can give them to his mom, an astronaut who is traveling to the moon. When a toy jet gets blown off course and becomes lost in the Everglades, an impossible place to find anything, it seems like the young boy who owns it will never get it back; Jett calls Mira's Wild Team for assistance.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young girl named Tess is excited go to Schiphol Airport in her hometown of Amsterdam, where she will be going on her first airplane ride; Jett brings her a carry-on suitcase, but trouble arises when it goes missing. A mishap clogs a hot spring in Nagano, Japan, causing several new hot springs to appear; Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn the calamity into a great new water park.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A virus disrupts a computer that is needed for a webcast that a girl named Yuna in Busan, South Korea, does with her father; Jett and the Galaxy Wings go into the computer and vanquish the virus. Three Filipina sisters ask Jett to deliver mics and a stand so they can participate in a singing concert; when they are late setting out for the concert, it's a race against time to get them on stage.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett flies to Battambang, Cambodia, to deliver a duck whistle to a girl named Solyna so she can help her parents herd their ducks into a truck; when the ducks escape, Sky scrambles Paul's Police Patrol to help. Jett delivers new basketball shoes to a boy named Manu in Spain who hopes that the shoes will allow him to dunk; when the shoes don't work, Jett and the Galaxy Wings take Manu to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Louisa in Germany goes to visit her favorite amusement park, she's sad to learn that it is being closed forever; the Super Wings work to give the park a makeover. Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city. A girl from Bangkok, Thailand, orders a baby carriage to take her kitten in to a famous local market. Chaos ensues when the cat escapes but Dizzy's Rescue Riders arrive to help.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy who lives on Mont Saint Michel in France wants to build the biggest and best sandcastle ever. With the power of teamwork, Loic might just see that dream come true - if they can save the sandcastle from a giant wave! When a girl in China gets the role of the Monkey King in a Beijing Opera version of "Journey to the West", Jett delivers an all important prop - the Monkey King's magical staff.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Build-It Buddies help a boy rescue animals. Jett delivers a hamster ball to a girl in Turkey.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a Selfie Stick to a boy named Anders in Norway. Jett joins Anders on a camping trip with his Dad that takes a strange turn when beavers disrupt their campsite. A girl who lives in Tuscany loves the constellations. She's even discovered one of her own. But when the constellation vanishes, a trip into space with the Galaxy Wings is the only way to find out why and fix it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a basket to a boy named Huddin in Moscow so he can deliver some special bread to his mom. Jett needs the help of Paul's Police Patrol when the bread gets left on a subway car. Jett delivers a cooking kit to a boy in Portland, USA and helps him make tofu rice burgers in his family's food truck. Dizzy's Rescue Raiders arrive to help when they get more customers than they can handle.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a surfboard to a girl named Clara who lives on the Gold Coast, Australia. Mira's Wild Team is called in to teach Clara to surf, but everyone winds up getting more than they bargained for when they also wind up helping to rescue a shark! Jett delivers a lion costume to a girl in London England. She is easily startled and hopes that the costume will make her brave.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a Hungarian Gypsy Fiddle to a girl named Petra in Budapest. Petra takes it to an amazing island, but the animals in the petting zoo are entranced by the music. A princess in England is excited about her five dogs attending a royal ball in fancy costumes that Jett delivers. But when a prince attending the ball is scared of the dogs Jett volunteers to puppy-sit and the dogs escape.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Comedy Cartoon Videos - Deviled Eggz
programme.desc: Yolk's on you! In this zany, hilarious world, some very devilish eggz are always pulling pranks on each other. In their kitchen, these deviled eggz like to compete to be the best. They are sure to crack you (and maybe themselves) up! This silent slapstick comedy cartoon series has over the top situations bound to amuse and entertain the kids and adults alike.

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs (Little Treehouse)
programme.desc: Let's explore the ocean with Baby Shark, Mommy Shark, Daddy Shark, Grandma Shark and Grandpa Shark.

programme.title: Baby Bao Panda Non-Stop
programme.desc: Baby Bao Panda non-stop playlist with fun & kids song videos. Children will watch and learn our other popular & kids friendly songs like row row your boat, jack and jill, three little kittens, ten in the bed, incy wincy spider and more cartoon rhymes and songs for babies.

programme.title: Little Eddie Popular Rhymes
programme.desc: Learning is always fun with Little Eddie popular nursery rhymes. We bring to you some amazing songs for kids to sing along with us and have a good time. Kids will dance, laugh, sing and play along with our videos while they also learn numbers, letters, colors, good habits and more!

programme.title: Old Macdonald & More Popular Rhymes
programme.desc: Traditional songs are great for learning a new language! Practice the animals in English with this timeless classic about farm animals!

programme.title: Little Red Car - Unlimited Songs
programme.desc: Each this animated children's rhymes compilation with colorful characters, along with catchy music.

programme.title: Colors Song Kids Learning Videos
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Farmees as they sing, dance in this fun kids learning video. Learn about Colors, alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool nursery rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Ben The Train Kids Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Mama and Papa let Sister go to a sleep over. Brother complains he has too much homework.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: The Bear Family find mementos in the attic. The cubs learn their friends are moving away.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Brother and Sister adopt a puppy. Brother and Sister damage Ms. Grizzle’s flowerbed.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Cousin Honey is afraid of going to the doctor. Brother and Sister visit a professor.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Brother doesn't do his homework when he's sick. Sister gets her first loose tooth.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Sister adopts a chipmunk. Mama teaches Sister the 'Star light, star bright' principle.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Papa takes the cubs fishing. Then, Brother gets his own key to the tree house.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Papa wants to remove an old tree stump. Then, Brother joins an art class.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Mama takes the cubs outside. Then, Sister gets a haircut.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Mama puts a ban on television for a week. Brother and Sister go trick or treating.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Brother and Sister forget their manners. Then, Mama organizes Papa’s workshop.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Brother helps with the school talent show. The Bear Family vacations in an old lighthouse.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: The Bears host a family reunion. Brother and Sister accidentally let cows loose!

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: Piggley waits until the last minute to write a two page true story.

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: The Raloo Rockers want to go to Dublin to audition for Uncle Buck’s Variety Express.

programme.title: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
programme.desc: Piggley wants a new snow sled for his birthday.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Mr. Boyd wanders around the park searching for his dog Bingo, who playfully hides in different areas of the park. Barney and the kids help find Bingo, and subsequently help Mr. Boyd prepare Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a checkup. This eventful day gives the kids an opportunity to learn lessons about how to care for a dog.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are so excited for a day of play and fun! When a bunch of empty boxes arrived from the Enjoy-Your-Toys Company, their adventure begins. They use their imagination to have the best time ever by transforming the boxes into special toys.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After playing with Stop and Go signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own. Barney and his friends think of other ways to stop and go and discuss reading, especially traffic signs!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends put together a Caboose Color Collection which showcases the primary colorsred, yellow and blue. This activity sparks Barney and the kids' imagination, and along with Baby Bop, they realize just how colorful the world can be!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children are amazed to find out that playing games and having fun in the park is a great way to exercise. When the rain starts to fall, they use their imagination to come up with clever ways to stay active and have fun indoors.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a much bigger responsibility than he ever expected when he offers to take care of a friends dog. When he accidentally loses the dog, everyone has to work together to find it. When Baby Bops favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the veterinarian for help. Barney and Riff pretend to be veterinarians. They show Baby Bop that theres nothing to be afraid of, because doctors and veterinarians are our friends too.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, its Barney that helps her see that winter can be a wonderful time for fun. Baby Bop is getting discouraged, wondering if it will ever snow. Then, when she least expects itthe snow begins to fall! On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the fun activities you can do during the summer. BJ gets so excited that he corrals Riff into joining him to do a whole summers worth of activities, all in one day! With some help from Baby Bop and the children, Barney teaches BJ that summer means relaxation, too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Its a very special day at the Parkits Barneys birthday, and there are surprises around every corner. When Barney begins to open his presents, Riff worries that his hand-made gift wont be good enough. In the end, Barney loves Riffs gift and reminds everyone that the best gift of all is one that comes from the heart. Baby Bop is practicing her marching because she will be joining a real marching rhythm band and is having trouble keeping a beat. Barney, BJ and Riff help Baby Bop learn about rhythm just in time for her to join the band.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone! BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles. When Barney suggests he rest in the caboose, BJ becomes frustrated, as hed rather be outside playing. Barney reminds him of the wonderful world of books, and the little dinos decide to write a book of their ownbased on the exciting true-life adventures of Captain Pickles!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJs enthusiastic efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Barney helps BJ learn that everyone makes mistakes. Together with his friends, BJ cleans up the mess he made on the caboose. Baby Bop cant wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip so she can have Barney and the park all to herself! But, once theyre gone, she discovers she misses them more than she expected and the more time that goes by, the more she misses them! Barney shows Baby Bop ways to keep friends close in our hearts while theyre away.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Barney helps them pass the time while teaching them about the days of the week. When the animals finally do arrive, everyone realizes that it was all worth the wait! Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJs beloved scooter. BJ loved that scooter more than almost anything! Riff and Baby Bop decide to have a sale in the park to raise money to buy BJ a brand-new scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! A case quickly comes his way when something nibbles on one of Baby Bops healthy snacks. BJ, Barney, and Baby Bop uncover several clues along the way and soon realize the culprit is someones pet rabbit. Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs. Together, they leave the eggs to look for food for when the ducklings hatch. When they return, Riff is pleasantly surprised to find the eggs have cracked open and the baby ducklings have hatched!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that The Land of Mother Goose truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help; parts of their rhymes are missing! Mother Goose arrives and fixes the problem, and all of the Mother Goose characters return home. BJ and Baby Bop hope to visit them soon. When Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, Riff and some children wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just cant wait to see what is in the box. Barney suggests they listen to a story while they wait. Baby Bop finally gets to open her present and realizes that sometimes waiting is a good thing!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop isnt satisfied with the things she can do. She wants to play the keyboard like Riff and wants to be able to skate like Barney. Nobody can cheer her up, until she unexpectedly gets the whole park dancing and she realizes there are things she can do, too! When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help. He gently reminds the others to include the child by showing them that even Barney feels excluded sometimes. It isnt always easy being a big, purple dinosaur. In the end, everyone is included for a day of fun!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Jamal has never danced before and is too shy to try. On the day of the big dance party in the park, Barney and his friends introduce Jamal to many kinds of dance. Barney assures Jamal that he can do anything he puts his mind to even dance. With Barneys help, Jamal finally finds his groove and has fun dancing with his friends! Barney tells Baby Bop the story of The Princess Without a Song to Sing. In this original fairytale, Baby Bop imagines herself as the sad little princess trying to find her unique song. Barney, BJ and Riff all become characters in the story, each sharing their songs and revealing an element of song, sound, rhythm and feeling. With their help, the princess finds her song and is delighted to sing it for her friends!

programme.title: The Misty Experiment: The Secret Battle for the Ho Chi Minh Trail
programme.desc: THE MISTY EXPERIMENT: THE SECRET BATTLE FOR THE HO CHI MINH TRAIL is an hour-long documentary that profiles a special U.S. Air Force squadron whose pilots volunteered for one of the wars most dangerous air missions. Their assignment: search for enemy supply transports and anti-aircraft installations concealed within the web of trail paths and waterways collectively known as the Ho Chi Minh Trail. The squadron also directed on-site rescue operations for U.S. and allied aircrews shot down while flying over the jungles of North Vietnam and Laos.The activities of Operation Commando Sabre, the official name of the mission, were classified as top secret during and immediately following the war. This documentary shares the story of the Misty squadron as told solely through the recollections of the veterans who volunteered for the mission. Their stories are enhanced by never-before-seen squadron footage and general archival combat footage from the war.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.

programme.title: Doolittle's Raiders: A Final Toast
programme.desc: The bottle of 1896 Hennessy Cognac was uncorked in front of hundreds of people. The surviving World War II veterans from one of historys greatest military missions were about to raise their silver goblets one last time ending a decades long tradition. It was time for the veterans to hold this final toast. They could wait no longer. Their numbers had dwindled to just a few. Many of the names of the 80 flyers who took part in the April 18, 1942 raid on Japan may not be familiar to most, but collectively they will always be known in history as the Doolittle Tokyo Raiders. Long ago these American flyers, aboard 16 B-25 bombers, had accomplished a daring mission that changed the morale of an entire nation. The aviators, led by famed commander Lt. Col. James Harold Doolittle, had taken the fight directly to the enemy for the first time in the war and delivered retribution for Japans sneak attack on Pearl Harbor on December 7, 1941.

programme.title: Survivors of Malmedy: December 1944
programme.desc: SURVIVORS OF MALMEDY: DECEMBER 1944 tells the story of the World War II massacre of 84 American soldiers in Belgium during the opening days of the famous Battle of the Bulge.On December 17, 1944, after a short battle, more than 130 American GIs were taken prisoner just outside the Belgian town of Malmedy and herded into a field by an infamous German SS division led by one of the Nazi's most brutal commanders. The unarmed American prisoners were gunned down. Those still alive after the initial shooting in the brutal cold were killed by SS soldiers ordered into the field to execute any Americans still breathing. Some American soldiers played dead. Some ran. Some escaped to nearby houses. In the end, more than 50 Americans did escape the infamous Malmedy Massacre. Today, just a handful of soldiers remain.Weaving interviews with the few remaining survivors of the massacre with archival footage, and drone video shot in the Malmedy area and in the field where the infamous event occurred, the emotional and powerful SURVIVORS OF MALMEDY chronicles what became known as the largest single mass murder of American troops in World War II.

Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. programme.title: Paleo Sleuths
programme.desc: Enter a prehistoric world when mammals ruled supreme and embark on a fossil safari with paleontologists (paleo sleuths) that reveals how changing climate transformed North America and the exotic mammals that lived there from 34 million years ago. This stunning documentary explores excavation sites across Americas heartland, including the incredible Ashfall Fossil Beds -- a graveyard of ancient rhinos, horses, camels, birds and carnivorous dogs. Lying in their death poses, the animals died of asphyxiation from falling ash from a 12 million year old super volcano. In another fascinating segment, two complete skeletons of bull mammoths are discovered locked together by their tusks and paleo sleuths investigate clues that might tell the story of their tragic death.With drone footage, 3-D models, cutting-edge animations, imaginative time-lapse sequences and paleontoligists in the field, PALEO SLEUTHS brings the age of mammals to life.
